name: Apikey Service
description: API key keystore for the 0exec mesh: issue/verify/revoke/list/purge. SQLite-backed, admin-token-gated. THE FLEET'S SINGLE POINT OF COMPROMISE — see fleet-state/OPS.md for hardening + rotation. NOT internet-exposed.
auth_help: api_key required (header X-API-Key or ?api_key=)
trl_evidence: Working keystore w/ SQLite + admin auth + WAL. 2026-05-13 added constant-time admin compare + method enforcement + max body size. Still: keys plaintext at rest, no rate-limit, no audit log, no tests.
trl_ceiling_reason: Reaches TRL 8 with: hash keys at rest (SHA-256), per-IP rate limit on /verify, audit log table for /issue+/revoke, full test coverage, automated SQLite backup. None require external paid services.
